mapper.sql: id, account_seq, serial_no, transaction_no, order_type, amount, status, available_balance_before, available_balance_after, frozen_balance_before, frozen_balance_after, total_balance_before, total_balance_after, wallet_addr, request_ip, user_id, user_role, name, currency, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, remark
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO account_statements ( serial_no, transaction_no, order_type, amount, status, available_balance_before, available_balance_after, frozen_balance_before, frozen_balance_after, total_balance_before, total_balance_after, wallet_addr, request_ip, user_id, user_role, name, currency, create_by, update_time, update_by, remark ) VALUES ( #{serialNo}, #{transactionNo}, #{orderType}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{availableBalanceBefore}, #{availableBalanceAfter}, #{frozenBalanceBefore}, #{frozenBalanceAfter}, #{totalBalanceBefore}, #{totalBalanceAfter}, #{walletAddr}, #{requestIp}, #{userId}, #{userRole}, #{name}, #{currency}, #{createBy}, #{updateTime}, #{updateBy}, #{remark} )
mapper.select:
INSERT INTO account_statements ( serial_no, transaction_no, order_type, amount, status, available_balance_before, available_balance_after, frozen_balance_before, frozen_balance_after, total_balance_before, total_balance_after, wallet_addr, request_ip, user_id, user_role, name, currency, create_by, update_time, update_by, remark ) VALUES
( #{item.serialNo}, #{item.transactionNo}, #{item.orderType}, #{item.amount}, #{item.status}, #{item.availableBalanceBefore}, #{item.availableBalanceAfter}, #{item.frozenBalanceBefore}, #{item.frozenBalanceAfter}, #{item.totalBalanceBefore}, #{item.totalBalanceAfter}, #{item.walletAddr}, #{item.requestIp}, #{item.userId}, #{item.userRole}, #{item.name}, #{item.currency}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.remark} )
RETURNING user_id, currency, create_time
mapper.update:
UPDATE account_statements
order_type = #{orderType}, amount = #{amount}, status = #{status},
available_balance_before = #{availableBalanceBefore}, available_balance_after = #{availableBalanceAfter},
frozen_balance_before = #{frozenBalanceBefore}, frozen_balance_after = #{frozenBalanceAfter},
total_balance_before = #{totalBalanceBefore}, total_balance_after = #{totalBalanceAfter},
wallet_addr = #{walletAddr}, request_ip = #{requestIp}, user_id = #{userId}, user_role = #{userRole}, name = #{name}, currency = #{currency},
create_by = #{createBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, update_by = #{updateBy},
remark = #{remark},
WHERE serial_no = #{serialNo}
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM account_statements
ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT FROM account_statements WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND currency = #{currency} AND status = 3 AND total_balance_before IS NULL AND total_balance_after IS NULL ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM account_statements WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND currency = #{currency} AND status = 0 AND order_type IN (11, 23) ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 1
